sets.title: Computing Concepts
sets.description: Foundational ideas in computer science: hardware, software, and how computers work.

sets.title: Data Systems
sets.description: Databases, data models, SQL, and information systems.

sets.title: Hour of Java
sets.description: A first look at Java — syntax, structure, and your very first program.

sets.title: Java Basics
sets.description: Variables, primitive types, operators, and basic input/output.

sets.title: Control Flow
sets.description: Conditionals, loops, switch statements, and branching logic.

sets.title: Algorithms
sets.description: Searching, sorting, and fundamental problem-solving patterns.

sets.title: Functions & Methods
sets.description: Defining and calling methods, parameters, return types, and scope.

sets.title: Types, Null & Imports
sets.description: Type casting, null handling, wrapper classes, and package imports.

sets.title: Collections
sets.description: ArrayList, HashMap, LinkedList, and the Java Collections Framework.

sets.title: Object-Oriented Programming
sets.description: Classes, objects, encapsulation, constructors, and OOP principles.

sets.title: Inheritance & Polymorphism
sets.description: Extending classes, method overriding, abstract classes, and interfaces.

sets.title: Exceptions
sets.description: Error handling, try/catch/finally, checked vs. unchecked exceptions.

sets.title: Streams & Lambdas
sets.description: Functional-style data processing with the Java Streams API.

sets.title: GUI Programming
sets.description: Building graphical interfaces with Java Swing components and event listeners.
